ast.name: error
ast.target: [Forge] 刷新库健康仪表板错误：

ast.name: error
ast.target: [Forge] 重新加载同步设置错误：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turn on bottom-of-note dataview expansion blocks.
ast.target: 开启笔记底部的 dataview 扩展块。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Current session only. Off disables automatic refresh. Edit idle waits after typing stops and also refreshes when you leave the note.
ast.target: 仅限当前会话。关闭会禁用自动刷新。编辑空闲会在停止输入后等待，并在您离开笔记时刷新。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How long forge waits after typing stops before refreshing the current note's dataview expansion.
ast.target: Forge 在停止输入后等待多长时间才刷新当前笔记的 dataview 扩展。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Title shown in the collapsed block appended to the end of the note.
ast.target: 附加到笔记末尾的折叠块中显示的标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum number of links written to the block. Use 0 for no limit.
ast.target: 写入区块的最大链接数。设为0表示无限制。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of lint run notes to keep.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Wrap file paths in [[wikilinks]] in lint run notes so you can navigate directly to affected files.
ast.target: 在lint运行笔记中将文件路径包装在[[wikilinks]]中，以便您可以直接导航到受影响的文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Skip notes in the configured inbox folder during vault lint so draft notes can stay incomplete while they are still being worked out.
ast.target: 在vault lint期间跳过已配置收件箱文件夹中的笔记，以便草稿笔记在仍在处理时可以保持不完整状态。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When to show the open vault repair button after a lint run.
ast.target: 在lint运行后何时显示打开vault修复按钮。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turn on background note linting. Forge waits 10 seconds after typing stops, and also lints when you leave the note or switch that note into reading view.
ast.target: 开启后台笔记lint。Forge会在输入停止后等待10秒，并且在您离开笔记或将该笔记切换到阅读视图时也会进行lint。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How long forge waits after typing stops before linting just the active note.
ast.target: Forge在输入停止后等待多久才对活动笔记进行lint。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Flag notes whose review cycle has elapsed, based on frontmatter field values.
ast.target: 根据前置字段值，标记审阅周期已过的笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create a backup of each modified file before applying a patch.
ast.target: 在应用补丁之前，为每个修改的文件创建备份。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Write a manifest file alongside each patch run so you can restore a full patch run in one step. Only active when backups are enabled.
ast.target: 在每次补丁运行时写入一个清单文件，以便您可以一步恢复完整的补丁运行。仅在启用备份时激活。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically run vault lint after a patch is applied.
ast.target: 应用补丁后自动运行vault lint。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically run vault maintenance after a patch is applied.
ast.target: 应用补丁后自动运行vault维护。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Delete patch backup files older than this many days.
ast.target: 删除早于此天数的补丁备份文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Age threshold used for stale inbox handling.
ast.target: 用于处理陈旧收件箱的年龄阈值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose whether stale inbox notes are deleted during maintenance or reported as lint warnings.
ast.target: 选择在维护期间是删除陈旧的收件箱笔记，还是将其报告为lint警告。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Trim lint history entries older than this many days.
ast.target: 修剪早于此天数的lint历史记录条目。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hard cap on the number of lint history entries to retain.
ast.target: 保留的lint历史记录条目的硬性上限。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Run vault maintenance silently whenever the vault health dashboard is refreshed.
ast.target: 每当刷新vault健康状况仪表板时，静默运行vault维护。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of patch report notes to keep.
ast.target: 保留的补丁报告笔记数量。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of shape lint run notes to keep.
ast.target: 保留的shape lint运行笔记数量。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enables vault inventory, meta, and ontology export commands.
ast.target: 启用vault清单、元数据和本体导出命令。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Builds per-type relationship indexes using the inventory and the filter settings below. Runs inventory export first if no inventory file is on disk.
ast.target: 使用清单和下面的筛选设置构建按类型的关系索引。如果磁盘上没有清单文件，则先运行清单导出。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Filename for the dataview dashboard note created on first export run. Leave blank to use 'vault-dashboard'.
ast.target: 首次导出运行时创建的dataview仪表板笔记的文件名。留空则使用'vault-dashboard'。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, notes marked as private are counted separately in the overview and excluded from vault-meta.json.
ast.target: 启用后，标记为私有的笔记在概览中单独计数，并从vault-meta.json中排除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The top-level heading under which relationship links are organised in your notes. Enter without the # — e.g. 'Related'. Subheadings under this heading become relationship keys.
ast.target: 笔记中组织关系链接的顶级标题。输入时不带# — 例如'Related'。此标题下的子标题成为关系键。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add folders to exclude from ontology indexing.
ast.target: 添加要从本体索引中排除的文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The heading under which relationship subheadings are grouped.
ast.target: 关系子标题分组所在的标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Heading level for the parent relationship heading. Subheadings are always one level below.
ast.target: 父关系标题的标题级别。子标题始终低一级。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Skip notes in the configured inbox folder during shape lint so draft structures can evolve before heading rules are enforced.
ast.target: 在shape lint期间跳过已配置收件箱文件夹中的笔记，以便草稿结构在强制执行标题规则之前可以演变。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Validate all notes in the vault, or limit to selected folders only.
ast.target: 验证vault中的所有笔记，或仅限于选定的文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only notes in these folders will be evaluated for shape heading validation.
ast.target: 仅评估这些文件夹中的笔记以进行shape标题验证。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow the run shape repair command to modify notes.
ast.target: 允许运行shape修复命令修改笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Repair all notes in the vault, or limit to selected folders only.
ast.target: 修复vault中的所有笔记，或仅限于选定的文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Notes in these folders will be evaluated for shape repair.
ast.target: 将评估这些文件夹中的笔记以进行shape修复。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Wrap file paths in [[wikilinks]] in repair run notes so you can navigate directly to affected files.
ast.target: 在修复运行笔记中将文件路径包装在[[wikilinks]]中，以便您可以直接导航到受影响的文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum number of repair run entries to keep in shape-repair-history.json.
ast.target: 在shape-repair-history.json中保留的最大修复运行条目数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The folder path currently referenced in dataview queries.
ast.target: 当前在dataview查询中引用的文件夹路径。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 仪表板刷新时自动运行

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 选择一个 Markdown 笔记...

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Choose a patch note or YAML file...
ast.target: 选择一个补丁笔记或 YAML 文件...

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Forge] Ignoring malformed dashboard operational_history cache leaf.
ast.target: [Forge] 忽略格式错误的仪表板操作历史缓存叶节点。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Forge] Could not update dashboard lint cache:
ast.target: [Forge] 无法更新仪表板 lint 缓存：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Forge] Could not update dashboard ontology cache:
ast.target: [Forge] 无法更新仪表板本体缓存：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Forge] Could not update dashboard shape lint cache:
ast.target: [Forge] 无法更新仪表板形状 lint 缓存：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Forge] Could not update dashboard patch history cache:
ast.target: [Forge] 无法更新仪表板补丁历史缓存：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Forge] Could not update dashboard operational history:
ast.target: [Forge] 无法更新仪表板操作历史：

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [Forge] 自动刷新保险库健康仪表板错误：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Forge] Could not preload health dashboard panel:
ast.target: [Forge] 无法预加载健康仪表板面板：

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Shapes is not enabled. Enable it in settings → shapes.
ast.target: Forge：形状功能未启用。请在设置 → 形状中启用它。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Shape repair is not enabled. Enable it in settings → shapes.
ast.target: Forge：形状修复未启用。请在设置 → 形状中启用它。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Shape repair scope is set to 'folder' but no folders are selected.
ast.target: Forge：形状修复范围设置为“文件夹”，但未选择任何文件夹。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Export is not enabled — enable it in settings → export.
ast.target: Forge：导出功能未启用 — 请在设置 → 导出中启用它。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: No filter configured — set a field and values in settings → export.
ast.target: Forge：未配置筛选器 — 请在设置 → 导出中设置字段和值。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: No inventory found — running export inventory first…
ast.target: Forge：未找到清单 — 正在先运行导出清单…

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Inventory export failed — ontology export aborted.
ast.target: Forge：清单导出失败 — 本体导出已中止。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Nothing to clean up — vault is within retention policy.
ast.target: Forge：无需清理 — 保险库符合保留策略。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Could not open upgrade guide.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: No lint report found. Run vault lint first.
ast.target: Forge：未找到 lint 报告。请先运行保险库 lint。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Repair patch written. Run apply vault patch when ready.
ast.target: Forge：修复补丁已写入。准备好后运行应用保险库补丁。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Overwriting existing patch file — previous operations will be replaced.
ast.target: Forge：正在覆盖现有补丁文件 — 之前的操作将被替换。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Patch file has no operations.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: All tags already normalized — no changes needed.
ast.target: Forge：所有标签已规范化 — 无需更改。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: All frontmatter already normalized — no changes needed.
ast.target: Forge：所有前置信息已规范化 — 无需更改。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: No patch manifests found. Apply a patch with restore manifests enabled first.
ast.target: Forge：未找到补丁清单。请先应用一个启用了恢复清单的补丁。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Could not read any patch manifests.
ast.target: Forge：无法读取任何补丁清单。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Both folder paths are required.
ast.target: Forge：两个文件夹路径都是必需的。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Current and new folder paths are the same.
ast.target: Forge：当前和新的文件夹路径相同。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Shape lint is disabled in settings.
ast.target: Forge：形状 lint 在设置中已禁用。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Dataview must be installed and enabled to use dataview expansion.
ast.target: Forge：必须安装并启用 Dataview 才能使用 Dataview 扩展。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Open a Markdown note first.
ast.target: Forge：请先打开一个 Markdown 笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Dataview expansion already up to date.

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: Forge：保险库健康仪表板已刷新。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Patch history refreshed in the dashboard.
ast.target: Forge：补丁历史已在仪表板中刷新。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: No operational runs have been recorded yet.
ast.target: Forge：尚未记录任何操作运行。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Could not open settings from this Obsidian version.
ast.target: Forge：无法从此 Obsidian 版本打开设置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Repair pass — interactive fix of lint errors
ast.target: 修复运行 — 交互式修复 lint 错误

ast.name: detail
ast.source: Backup folder does not exist yet

ast.name: detail
ast.source: Inbox retention is configured to report stale notes as lint warnings
ast.target: 收件箱保留策略配置为将过时笔记报告为 lint 警告

ast.name: message
ast.source: tag_rules.forbidden_namespaces must be a list if present
ast.target: tag_rules.forbidden_namespaces 如果存在，必须是一个列表

ast.name: name
ast.target: 重命名 Dataview 文件夹

ast.name: name
ast.source: Refresh dataview expansion in current folder
ast.target: 刷新当前文件夹的 Dataview 展开

ast.name: name
ast.source: Refresh dataview expansion in whole vault
ast.target: 刷新整个保险库的 Dataview 展开

ast.name: name
ast.target: 打开保险库健康仪表板

ast.name: name
ast.target: 刷新保险库健康仪表板

ast.name: text
ast.source: Each file below was backed up before repair. Restoring replaces the current note content with the pre-repair backup. This cannot be undone.
ast.target: 以下每个文件在修复前都已备份。恢复操作将用修复前的备份替换当前笔记内容。此操作无法撤销。

ast.name: text
ast.source: All paths are relative to your vault root.
ast.target: 所有路径均相对于您的保险库根目录。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Collects link results from every dataview block in a note and writes one collapsed compatibility block at the bottom for graph view and raw-Markdown readers.
ast.target: 收集笔记中每个 Dataview 块的链接结果，并在底部写入一个折叠的兼容性块，供图谱视图和原始 Markdown 阅读器使用。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Dataview expansion is unavailable because the dataview plugin is not installed or not enabled.
ast.target: Dataview 展开不可用，因为 Dataview 插件未安装或未启用。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Notes inside these folders are skipped during ontology export. Applies at any depth — add a top-level folder to exclude everything under it.
ast.target: 在本体导出期间，这些文件夹内的笔记将被跳过。适用于任何深度——添加一个顶级文件夹可排除其下的所有内容。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Run a manual refresh to scan the vault and populate this dashboard.
ast.target: 运行手动刷新以扫描保险库并填充此仪表板。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Settings changed on another device. Reload to apply the synced changes.
ast.target: 设置已在另一台设备上更改。重新加载以应用同步的更改。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Open a markdown note to see its active lint status here.
ast.target: 打开一个 Markdown 笔记以在此处查看其活动检查状态。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Active-file auto-lint is turned off in settings.
ast.target: 活动文件自动检查已在设置中关闭。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Current note has changes waiting for the next auto-lint run.
ast.target: 当前笔记有更改正在等待下一次自动检查运行。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Current note has not been linted yet in this session.
ast.target: 当前笔记在此会话中尚未被检查。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No issues found for the current note.

ast.name: text
ast.source: No active lint issues in the latest snapshot.
ast.target: 最新快照中没有活动的检查问题。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Ontology metrics have not been collected yet.

ast.name: text
ast.source: Shape lint has not been run yet.

ast.name: text
ast.source: No maintenance history has been read yet.
ast.target: 尚未读取任何维护历史。

ast.name: text
ast.source: See the upgrade guide for the full migration steps and a complete before/after example.
ast.target: 请参阅升级指南，了解完整的迁移步骤和完整的前后示例。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No operations collected — nothing to patch.
ast.target: 未收集到任何操作——无需打补丁。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 查看 lint 运行说明

ast.name: text
ast.source: Errors will not be applied. You can still proceed with the successful operations.
ast.target: 错误将不会被应用。您仍可继续执行成功的操作。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No changes needed — vault already matches the patch.
ast.target: 无需更改 — 保险库已与补丁匹配。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Operation-level restore data will be written for this patch run.
ast.target: 将为此补丁运行写入操作级恢复数据。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Select a patch run. Newer manifests can restore selected operations without overwriting later edits.
ast.target: 选择一个补丁运行。较新的清单可以恢复选定的操作，而不会覆盖后续编辑。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This older manifest does not contain operation data. Restore will overwrite current files with backup content.
ast.target: 此旧版清单不包含操作数据。恢复将用备份内容覆盖当前文件。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 重命名 dataview 文件夹

ast.name: text
ast.source: Updates folder path references inside dataview blocks only. Lines outside dataview blocks are never touched.
ast.target: 仅更新 dataview 块内的文件夹路径引用。dataview 块外的行永远不会被修改。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 重命名 dataview 文件夹 — 确认

ast.name: text
ast.target: 查看形状 lint 运行说明
